channel.title: Dan Patrick Show (Filtered)
channel.description: Daily DP Show episodes without C&R or Best Of clips.
channel.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Dan Hurley, Preparing for Seton’s Exit
item.description:
UConn Men’s Head Basketball Coach Dan Hurley gives his thoughts on their loss to Michigan in the National Championship and laments the chaos of modern-day college basketball with NIL and the transfer portal. Dan and the Danettes prepare for Seton’s exit from the daily show.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Scott Van Pelt, Dave Roberts, Shock Collar
item.description:
Scott Van Pelt previews the Masters live from Augusta and gives some parting words for Seton. DP caught up with Dodgers Manager Dave Roberts before their game in Toronto yesterday and he shares their conversation. And Dylan the Graphics Guy pays his debt while DP and the Danettes laugh at his obvious discomfort.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – The Masters Begins, Wemby Is Undeniable
item.description:
Dan waxes poetic about Augusta National as The Masters get underway this morning. Plus, DP continues to be amazed by Victor Wembanyama’s improvement and compares his development to some of the other great players in NBA history.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Doc Rivers, Mike Vaccaro
item.description:
Milwaukee Bucks HC Doc Rivers joins the show to figure out who, between himself and Dan, will retire first; plus he talks about Giannis Antetokounmpo and what he wants from the Bucks. New York Post writer Mike Vaccaro discusses his new book about late Yankees owner George Steinbrenner, his mystique and feuds with the press, and how George would handle social media if he was alive today.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Kon Knueppel vs. Cooper Flagg, Masters Par 3 Controversy
item.description:
Betting odds seem to favor Hornets’ forward Kon Knueppel over the Mavericks’ Cooper Flagg for NBA Rookie of the Year, and Dan has a big problem with it. And DP addresses the criticism over this year’s Celebrity Par 3 Contest at the Masters.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3: Doc Rivers Steps Down & NFL Complainers
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington talk more about Doc Rivers stepping down as the Head Coach of the Milwaukee Bucks yesterday. Plus, the guys go over the NFL collusion ruling from last week on QB negotiations, a Coachella edition of the Leftovers, and more!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2: Diana Russini & Mike Vrabel Investigations
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington go more in depth on the Mike Vrabel & Diana Russini saga with investigations being done in to Russini's reporting. Plus, the guys talk about why this years NFL draft may not be as buzz worthy this year, FSR IR, and more!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1: Rory McIIroy Wins & NBA Regular Season Ends
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington fill in for the Dan Patrick Show as they recap Rory McIIroy winning the Master's for the 2nd time in a row. Plus, the guys go over the NBA regular season finale, Mikal Bridges never missing a start, a statue version of ICYMI, and much more! 

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3: Pete Prisco Stops By
item.description:
Jonas Knox & LaVar Arrington chat with Pete Prisco as they talk about Rueban Bain's story, the drama around Mike Vrabel and Diana Russini, and others. Plus, the guys discuss Tyrese Haliburton's shingles diagnosis, we have a icy cold edition of the Leftovers, and more!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2: Colorado Losing Steam?
item.description:
Jonas Knox & LaVar Arrington talk about the Colorado Buffaloes led by coach Deion Sanders and why the Buffs are starting to lose steam after their spring game attendance dropped off this year. Plus, the guys go more in depth on the NFL international games and the complaints about the early Australia game for this season, more on the Rueban Bain Jr story, and more!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1: No Brainer's & Honeybuns
item.description:
Jonas Knox & LaVar Arrington fill in for the Dan Patrick Show as they ponder whether CJ Stroud is a good egg after the Texans exercised his 5th year option. Plus, the guys talk about the NBA Play-In games, whether Luka Doncic is great, a honeybun version of ICYMI, and much more! 

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – LIV Tour Collapsing, Reggie Miller
item.description:
LIV Golf attempted a palace coup on the PGA Tour and DP sheds exactly zero tears at its demise. Basketball Hall of Famer and NBA analyst Reggie Miller joins Dan to discuss which teams in the NBA Playoffs have a legitimate shot to make the Finals and the defender he feared the most playing against.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – NFL Draft Preview, Albert Breer
item.description:
Fernando Mendoza is the likely number one pick in the NFL Draft, but he can’t say that out loud beforehand. Meanwhile Dan thinks Jeremiyah Love is the best player in the draft. MMQB senior writer Albert Breer joins Dan to discuss the trade of Dexter Lawrence from the Giants to the Bengals, the renewed saga of Aaron Rodgers and the Pittsburgh Steelers, plus what he’s hearing around the NFL Draft.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Dexter Lawrence Trade, NBA MVP Voting
item.description:
Dan reacts to the blockbuster deal between the Bengals and Giants involving Dexter Lawrence. And with the NBA Playoffs now in full swing, Dan discusses the first weekend of action, plus the finalist for NBA MVP – does Jokic have a shot against Shai-Gilgeous Alexander and Victor Wembanyama?

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3: Bruce Feldman Stops By
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington chat with Bruce Feldman on inside NFL draft intel and other draft talks. Plus, the guys give out a fine on the show, go over a possible retirement for Jimmy Garoppolo, a 1st time edition of The Leftovers, and more!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2: Trent Wiliams Re-Signs With 49ers & OBJ Trying Out?
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington recap the 49ers re-signing Trent Williams and what that means for their team going forward. Plus, the guys ponder Odell Beckham Jr. working out for the Giants at their team facilities, Billy Donovan stepping down as Bulls HC, and more!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1: Steve Kerr's Warriors Tenure
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington fill in for the Dan Patrick Show as they ponder if Steve Kerr's tenure as Head Coach of the Golden State Warriors has come to an end. Plus, the guys talk about how basketball used to be back in the day as compared to how James Harden plays with all offense no defense; we have a fun edition of ICYMI, and much more! 

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Tribute to Pittsburgh, Frank Caliendo
item.description:
Fritzy gets loose with a musical homage to Pittsburgh that you must hear to believe. And legendary impressionist Frank Caliendo drops by to entertain Dan, the Danettes and everyone who came out for the live broadcast from Pittsburgh.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Brian Windhorst, Fernando Mendoza
item.description:
DP talks to NBA insider Brian Windhorst about Victor Wembanyama’s concussion and the rest of the NBA Playoffs. And he catches up with projected #1 pick in tomorrow’s NFL Draft, Fernando Mendoza and asks him about his plans for tomorrow night.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Live from Pittsburgh at the NFL Draft, Jerome Bettis
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes arrive in Pittsburgh on the eve of the NFL Draft! They talk a little NBA Playoffs before getting into draft talk. Plus, Pittsburgh Steelers legend and NFL Hall of Fame RB, Jerome Bettis stops by the set.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick
